rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §65.003 governs truant conduct in schools. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter and share no operative overlap.
quote: A child engages in truant conduct if the child is required to attend school under Section 25.085, Education Code, and fails to attend school on 10 or more days or parts of days within a six-month period in the same school year.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to proposed homestead exemption change.
